workloads.name: buffer-upload 1KB
workloads.description: Single upload command used to align with Dawn BufferUploadPerf WriteBuffer 1KB.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched single queue write upload shape on both sides.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Upload microbenchmark mode: run 500 uploads per Fawn sample, ignore first upload op, use explicit size-tuned submit cadence, and normalize to per-upload units.

workloads.name: buffer-upload 64KB
workloads.description: Single upload command aligned with Dawn BufferUploadPerf WriteBuffer 64KB.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched single queue write upload shape on both sides.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Upload microbenchmark mode: run 500 uploads per Fawn sample, use explicit size-tuned submit cadence (64KB uses submitEvery=100), and normalize to per-upload units.

workloads.name: buffer-upload 1MB
workloads.description: Single upload command aligned with Dawn BufferUploadPerf WriteBuffer 1MB.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched single queue write upload shape on both sides.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Upload microbenchmark mode: run 50 uploads per Fawn sample, ignore first upload op, use explicit size-tuned submit cadence, and normalize to per-upload units.

workloads.name: buffer-upload 4MB
workloads.description: Single upload command aligned with Dawn BufferUploadPerf WriteBuffer 4MB.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched single queue write upload shape on both sides.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Upload microbenchmark mode: run 50 uploads per Fawn sample, ignore first upload op, use explicit size-tuned submit cadence, and normalize to per-upload units.

workloads.name: buffer-upload 16MB
workloads.description: Single upload command aligned with Dawn BufferUploadPerf WriteBuffer 16MB.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched single queue write upload shape on both sides.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Upload microbenchmark mode: run 50 uploads per Fawn sample, ignore first upload op, use explicit size-tuned submit cadence, and normalize to per-upload units.

workloads.name: workgroup-atomic 1024
workloads.description: Workgroup-atomic compute kernel with 1024 workgroups, 100 dispatches per step, matching Dawn WorkgroupAtomicPerf exactly.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Kernel matches Dawn GenWorkgroupWithAtomics (256 threads, 1 atomicStore + 256 atomicLoads per invocation). Both sides dispatch 100 times per step; Dawn divides internally by iterationsPerStep=100, Fawn divides via leftTimingDivisor.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Dawn divides by iterationsPerStep=100 internally; Fawn dispatches 100 times via repeat and divides here to match.

workloads.name: workgroup-non-atomic 1024
workloads.description: Non-atomic workgroup compute kernel with 1024 workgroups, 100 dispatches per step, matching Dawn WorkgroupAtomicPerf non-atomic variant.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Kernel matches Dawn GenWorkgroupNoAtomics (256 threads, 1 store + 256 loads per invocation). Both sides dispatch 100 times per step; Dawn divides internally, Fawn divides via leftTimingDivisor.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Dawn divides by iterationsPerStep=100 internally; Fawn dispatches 100 times via repeat and divides here to match.

workloads.name: shader-compile pipeline stress
workloads.description: Shader robustness pipeline stress aligned with Dawn ShaderRobustnessPerf (MatMulFloatOneDimSharedArray, f32, 512x512x512).
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched compute pipeline creation + dispatch shape against Dawn ShaderRobustnessPerf MatMulFloatOneDimSharedArray f32 variant, including 50-dispatch step normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Dawn reports per-iteration metrics with iterationsPerStep=50; Fawn kernel dispatch repeats 50 and normalizes to per-dispatch units.

workloads.name: render draw throughput (directional)
workloads.description: Directional render/draw throughput workload using native render-pass draw submission in Fawn.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional only: both sides use draw submissions with Dawn-like 64x64 target, centered-triangle geometry, depth24plus-stencil8 attachment, and static uniform bind-group semantics; Fawn also exposes explicit pipelineMode/bindGroupMode variants (static|redundant), but full Dawn draw-state coverage remains simplified.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional only: Dawn DrawCallPerf reports per draw (iterationsPerStep=2000); Fawn render_draw normalizes to per-draw units.

workloads.name: texture sampling/raster (directional)
workloads.description: Directional texture/raster workload combining a real texture-sampling kernel dispatch plus a native render_draw raster step.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional only: Fawn combines compute texture sampling with a simplified Dawn-like centered-triangle render_draw pass (depth24plus-stencil8 + static uniform bind-group semantics, with explicit pipelineMode/bindGroupMode variants); Dawn workload includes richer render-pass sampling/raster transitions.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional only: Dawn SubresourceTrackingPerf reports per iteration (iterationsPerStep=50); Fawn repeats the combined compute+render path and normalizes to per-iteration units.
